IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: Serving Indiana public and private higher education libraries and faculty. ALI'S mission is to enhance and enrich the full range of resources and services required to improve quality of teaching, learning, and research in Indiana.
IRS990.MissionDesc: To enhance and enrich the full range of information resources and services required to improve the quality of teaching, learning, research, and engagement in Indiana colleges, universities, and seminaries through collaboration, resource sharing, and advocacy.
IRS990.Desc: Creating shared resources for higher education public and private institutions.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section A, Line 6
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: ALI is a membership organization. ALI'S members have the right to elect officers and members of the governing body. The members also approve significant decisions of the governing body such as budgets, elections, and strategic plans. The membership would also approve the dissolution of the organization and all changes in governing documents. Upon dissolution, net assets will be distributed to the membership.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section A, Line 7a
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: There is one class of membership consisting of each of the membership organizations. All the members of the class have one vote. All members elect the officers and members of the governing body.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section A, Line 7b
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: The membership must approve all changes to the governing documents. The membership must also approve the dissolution of the organization.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section B, Line 11b
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: A complete copy in electronic format was provided to the treasurer.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section B, Line 15
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: ALI does not have employees nor provide compensation to any management official or officer.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section C, Line 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: Currently, governing documents, Form 990, Form 1023, and financial statements are made available to the public upon request.

ReasonableCauseExplanation.ExplanationTxt: A timely extension was filed, therefore the return is not late.
